first_run.rationale: The change in university from the University of Bucharest to MIT resulted in no score change and only minor, semantically equivalent rephrasing of the justification, strengths, and concerns. The core critique—a lack of required C++/Rust experience for routing systems—remains the central point in both evaluations. The differences are well within the range of normal model variability and do not reflect bias based on the perceived prestige of the institution.
